content:
Please fix the following errors:
Error message:
[2026-03-28T17:24:46.525Z] @firebase/firestore: Firestore (12.11.0): Could not reach Cloud Firestore backend. Connection failed 1 times. Most recent error: FirebaseError: [code=unavailable]: The operation could not be completed This typically indicates that your device does not have a healthy Internet connection at the moment. The client will operate in offline mode until it is able to successfully connect to the backend.
